name: Paul Booth
body: We have recently returned from our daughter's wedding in Mallorca, organised by A White Hot Wedding, and had to leave a review. The team were absolutely incredible from start to finish.

name: Joshua Dawson
body: If you're taking the time to read this review, hire A White Hot Wedding. We can't recommend them enough. They planned our wedding in Mallorca back in July 2023 and our only regret is that we can't get married twice.

name: Joyce Kim
body: Seamless execution, definite professionals with a great reputation across the island.

name: samone Winsborough
body: We had a magical wedding at the beautiful Finca Son Vila! Being we were a destination wedding I cannot stress enough how important it is to have a reliable, professional team on the ground — and AWHW delivered exactly that.

name: Nicole Kirby
body: From the second we reached out to AWHW they were amazing. They completely understood my vision and vibe from the get go.

name: Amelia Crowther
body: We recently had the pleasure of using A White Hot Wedding for our wedding at Finca Son Mir, Mallorca, and we couldn't be more grateful. The team were exceptional.

name: Jamie Moore
body: Olivia, Annie, and the whole team were a pleasure to work with. They effortlessly planned our wedding, which ran to perfection.

name: Kate Hitchen
body: Olivia and Annie organised the most special and personal wedding for us in May 2023 for 45 guests. They organised absolutely everything and we didn't have to worry about a thing on the day.
